<?php namespace Faker\Provider\da_DK; class Internet extends \Faker\Provider\Internet { /** * @var array Some safe email TLD. */ protected static $safeEmailTld = [ 'org', 'com', 'net', 'dk', 'dk', 'dk', ]; /** * @var array Some email domains in Denmark. */ protected static $freeEmailDomain = [ 'gmail.com', 'yahoo.com', 'yahoo.dk', 'hotmail.com', 'hotmail.dk', 'mail.dk', 'live.dk', ]; /** * @var array Some TLD. */ protected static $tld = [ 'com', 'com', 'com', 'biz', 'info', 'net', 'org', 'dk', 'dk', 'dk', ]; }
